queries.q: Do a competitive analysis of the top five project-management tools before we enter that market
We keep losing enterprise deals to two rivals; break down their features, pricing, and positioning against ours
queries.notes: Intent-only ask; losing deals is a listed use case

queries.q: Map the competitive landscape for AI meeting assistants: direct, indirect, and potential disruptors
Leadership wants to know where we can differentiate; compare our product against the main alternatives on features and strategy
We're weighing build versus buy for analytics; analyze the vendor landscape so we understand the alternatives
Put together the market-landscape section for our annual planning review, comparing positioning across our top competitors
Create a competitive analysis of Figma, Sketch, and Penpot for our design-tool strategy
A well-funded startup just entered our space; assess how their offering stacks up and where we're exposed
Onboard our new PM with a structured overview of who we compete with and how we win
What are the feature gaps between us and the category leader, and where should we differentiate?
How big is the addressable market for B2B expense tools? Give me TAM, SAM, and SOM
queries.notes: Market size rather than competitor positioning, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: I want to understand why customers switch from competitors to us, in terms of the progress they're trying to make
queries.notes: Switching examined through the job lens, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Stress-test our differentiation across the whole business model on a lean canvas
The landscape is already mapped; now frame the problem we're going after as a problem statement
Synthesize the win-loss interview notes from the deals we lost last quarter
Draft the PRD for the comparison-table feature on our pricing page
queries.notes: Contains comparison language but is a specification ask

queries.q: Debug why this Express endpoint returns a 500 only in production
Write a SQL query joining accounts and subscriptions to find expansion revenue
Book a rental car and hotel for my trip to the trade show in Las Vegas
Build a persona for the economic buyer in our mid-market accounts
